title: NEHU Result 2025

detail.title: NEHU Result 2025
detail.short_info: NEHU Result 2025: North Eastern Hill University Result 2025 has been released on nehu.ac.in. Here is the direct Link to check your M.A 2nd Semester Results Online.

content.text: NEHU Result 2025 is out! Check your M.A results now on the official website nehu.ac.in. Get the direct link to download your NEHU Marksheet 2025 here.

sections.heading: How to Check the NEHU Results 2025?

content.text: North Eastern Hill University announces its results online through the official website. To access their results, students must visit the website and locate the designated result link. Since the results are not publicly available, students are required to enter their roll number to view their individual scores.

items: Go to the official website: nehu.ac.in.​
On the homepage, look for the “Results” or “Examination” link/tab.
Choose your relevant course (UG, PG, B.Tech, etc.) and semester from the available options.​
Enter your roll number, registration number, or the required credentials to proceed.​
Click on the submit button to view your result.​
Download or print the mark sheet for your records. Results are usually provided in PDF format that you can save.
